ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "us_size" REAL /* US shoe size */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* UK shoe size */,
  "eu_size" REAL /* EU shoe size */,
  "inches" REAL /* Shoe length in inches */,
  "cm" REAL /* Shoe length in centimeters */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (men, women, children) */,
  "width" TEXT /* Shoe width (narrow, standard, wide) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand associated with the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the product belongs */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product packaging */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Current discount percentage */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's website */,
  "brand_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "us_size" REAL /* US size available for the product */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* UK size available for the product */,
  "eu_size" REAL /* EU size available for the product */,
  "stock_available" INTEGER /* Stock available for this size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_us_size FOREIGN KEY ("us_size") REFERENCES size_conversions ("us_size"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred size */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's contact number */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of user registration */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred size */,
  "preferred_brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred brand */,
  "preferred_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred category */,
  "foot_length_in" REAL /* User's foot length in inches */,
  "foot_length_cm" REAL /* User's foot length in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
